SEARCH
Package me.damoebe.architectures.transformer

Klasse Block<H extends Head,N extends FFNetwork>

java.lang.Object
me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.Block<H,N>
Typparameter:
H - The Head type that should be used to construct the MultiHeadAttention attribute.
N - The MLP type that will be used in this block.
public class Block<H extends Head,N extends FFNetwork> extends Object
The Transformer Bock class containing a mha and multiple mlps.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    Block(@NotNull MultiHeadAttention<H> multiHeadAttention, N multiLayerPerceptron)

    Methode
    Beschreibung
    Block<H,N>
    clone()
     
    Sequence
    getOutputFor(Sequence... inputEmbeddings)
    Gets the output for the inserted input(s) by passing them through the mha module and mlp.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Block

      public Block(@NotNull @NotNull MultiHeadAttention<H> multiHeadAttention, @NotNull N multiLayerPerceptron)
      The main constructor of the Block class
      Parameter:
      multiHeadAttention - A MultiHeadAttention object that will be cloned and used for this block.
      multiLayerPerceptron - A FFNetwork object that will be cloned and used as an MLP architecture.

  • Methodendetails

    • getOutputFor

      public Sequence getOutputFor(Sequence... inputEmbeddings)
      Gets the output for the inserted input(s) by passing them through the mha module and mlp.
      Parameter:
      inputEmbeddings - A list of inputs: if the head type is EDHead: [0] is the decoder input and [1] is the encoder input. Else: [0] is the head input.
      Gibt zurück:
      The output embeddings for this block.

    • clone

      public Block<H,N> clone()
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      clone in Klasse Object
